title: Rhizome - Hypixel SkyBlock
description: Not Enough Gadgets for Hypixel SkyBlock!
body:
## Non Duplicate Features from SkyBlocker Mod

<details>
<summary>M7 Dragons & Melody Message</summary>
  
### Dragon Priority, Dragon Spawn Timer, Dragon Health Display & Melody Message
  ![M7 Dragons Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/4ff6f727fcc849fde3d28f6d776164b41a2089f0.png)
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Rainbow Max Enchants</summary>

  ![Rainbow Max Enchants Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/44c181d394ef2881ba62fe069252cd98ffbc5b32.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Simple Warp Menu</summary>

### A full client side warp menu without open ping delay
![Simple Warp Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/e25d4a8cf688b5373b65dc4b235d6e57bf07b4fc.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Quick Item Swap</summary>

### use SHIFT + RIGHT_CLICK in INVENTORY to swap item quickly and bind the MAP in a config screen with hint
![Quick Item Swap Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/88db1016300166d83d695067c7aa2143e6363fda.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Undying Timer (Bonzo, Spirit, Phoenix)</summary>

### make sure to set your PING first!
![Undying Timer Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/9b7daf8af25a4d8d9bc031fe5e6642b782784081.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Quick Mask Swap</summary>

use in catacomb floor 7 INSTANT_4 to equip your Bonzo/Spirit Mask fast by open inventory and press the hot key and close inventory, you need to put the mask in your hotbar and bind the map in config screen first, there is also a white list for masks
![Quick Mask Swap Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/af4514a9c0800287ed2ba37932720341d67d6816.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Tooltip Scroll (No Top Overflow)</summary>

### No Top Overflow
You can always see the name of an item. Hold ALT to prevent the tooltip resetting

</details>

<details>
<summary>Chat Channel</summary>

### Simple Chat Channel with Normal, All, Party, Guild
The simple chat trigger is lame, don't use it.
![Chat Channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/df63ee07e3963bcf0e825f646b3209443f9b7485.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Chat/Command Macro Panel</summary>

![Chat/Command Macro Panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zXQSPnt4/images/3977eb8974253177ec53bf37243155d1a0316bd7.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Custom Fishing Timer Bar & Sound by Texture Pack</summary>

You can customize fishing timer from 1.0 second to 0.0 second. Make sure to enable the skyblock's default one
[Fishing Timer Pack Template](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fishing-timer-pack-template)

</details>

### Toggle Sprint KeyBind
option for toggle toggle sprint to stay toggled when launch game
### Party Waypoint KeyBind
press the keybind when something rare happens to share it to party or open the index menu wheel panel(bottom one) to share to public
### Second Attack KeyBind
function as attack key but no need to hold a mouse
### Warp Menu KeyBind
Open the Simple Warp Menu or send "/warp"
### Better Bold Offset
make the 'M' & 'W' character better
### Rekindle Time
make you unable to move after death in crimson isle and the end
### Small First Person Item Model
no render issue when drinking potions
### Hide Armor
let you see player skins!
### Custom Hand Swing
make the hand swing no more jittery at high level haste
### Custom Fishing Line
2 color based gradient fising line
